Thread a six-inch or 12-inch cord into the easy-grasp drawing tool, slide a picture under the window with a hook-and-loop surface, and trace to draw! The set includes 39 colored cords, cord drawing tool, six double-sided pictures to trace, and a take-along storage case.']

Ridemakerz Xtreme Customz Starter Kit - Viper GTS, Green and Black Rally
['From the Manufacturer', 'New from , it’s XTREME . Get ready to build and customize the car or "RIDE" of your dreams with snap-on parts including custom rims, engines, and sidepipes. Choose from authentic automotive RIDEZ like the Dodge Viper and Chevy Corvette to "Hero" RIDEZ like Spider-Man and Batman. With more than a dozen different styles, you’ll want to collect them all. MIX N MATCH PARTS: Each kit includes a set of Mix N Match parts – ranging from flame sidepipes to bat wings to supercharged engines. All parts are interchangeable across bodystyles so you can customize and trick ‘em out over and over again. If you can dream it, you can build it. XTREME  RIDEZ even have a 4-mode adjustable chassis so you can customize the way you cruise. Choose from Race, Jacked, Lifted and Off-Road…. all with the push of a button. XTREME  RIDEZ are approximately 1:48 scale or the size of a cell phone. XTREME  Starter Kits come with everything you need to build and customize a rad RIDE. Each kit comes with a RIDE body and 4-mode adjustable chassis plus: 4-piece set of reversible rims, 4-piece set of tires, Spoiler, 2-piece set of sidepipes, Exclusive accessory.']
['Build and customize your own RIDE', 'Choose from real-world cars like the Chevy Corvette and Dodge Viper', 'You can even build your favorite superheros, like Batman and Spider-Man', 'Trick ‘em out with interchangeable custom rims, engine, side pipes, and other cool accessories', 'Customize how you roll with a 4-mode adjustable chassis']

Dalmatian Puppy Spotty Dog Chasing Race Track Game Set - Playful Roller Coaster Playset with LED Flashing Lights and Music On/Off Button for Toddlers and Kids
["Get ready for some puppy-powered fun with the Dalmatian Puppy Spotty Dog Chasing Race Track Game Set! Your little ones will be in for endless hours of entertainment as they watch the adorable dalmatian pups race down the vibrant track with charming flags for an easy-going energy. This battery-operated toy set is not only eye-catching with its vivid colors, but also toxin-free, ensuring lasting durability with its ABS construction. It's been ASTM tested and certified safe, so you can be sure that your child is playing with a product that is both fun and secure. With flashing LED lights and cheerful music, the Dalmatian Puppy Spotty Dog Chasing Race Track Game Set is perfect for stimulating your child's curiosity and hand-eye coordination. And when you need some peace and quiet, you can simply switch off the music with the convenient on/off button. Measuring at 13.3'' W x 9.1'' H x 3'' D, this playful roller coaster playset is easy to assemble and includes one battery-operated Dalmatian Spotty Dog Chasing Game board and three racing puppies. You'll need three AA batteries (not included) to get started, but once you do, your child will be transported to a whole new paradise of playful doggies. Recommended for children aged 3 years and up, the Dalmatian Puppy Spotty Dog Chasing Race Track Game Set is the perfect addition to your child's toy collection. So, what are you waiting for? Get ready for some puppy-powered fun and watch your child's imagination run wild!"]
['READY TO RACE: Let your little ones have endless fun with this Dalmatian Puppy Spotty Dog Chasing Race Track Game Set. They will be delighted as they watch the cute puppies slide down the track with vibrant hues and charming flags for an easy-going and exciting energy.', " LIGHTS AND MUSIC: This playful roller coaster playset comes with flashing LED lights and cheerful music that your kids will love. You can turn off the music for quiet playtime. Easy assembly and cute puppies make it a must-have for your little one's toy collection.", 'SAFETY FIRST: The race track set features an eye-catching design with vivid colors and solid ABS construction for lasting durability.', " SKILLS: This race track set is not only fun but also helps develop your child's imagination, curiosity, and hand-eye coordination. Watch as they explore a whole new world of playful doggies and let their creativity run wild!", "GIFT : The set includes a battery-operated Dalmatian Spotty Dog Chasing Game board and 3 racing puppies. The set measures 13.3'' W x 9.1'' H x 3'' D and requires 3 x AA batteries (not included). It is recommended for kids aged 3 and above."]

['This Italian racing car cleans up on the slopes. The sleek model is a real dream car that lights up the eyes of all car fans. In the GT3 version, which made its racing debut at the ADAC GT Masters in Spielberg in 2015, it is even more snappy than in the popular road version. The Lamborghini Huracán GT3 shows all opposing racing drivers its rear with about 500-hp. You\'ll race through the tracks with the new Lamborghini Huracán GT3 "No.98" in a chic, bright blue robe with extra speed! If you dash across the Carrera race track with him, you can show all your friends and opponents what speed looks like. The 1:43 scale slot car is fitted with replaceable double contact brushes for maximum contact with the slot car track while down force magnets make for quick cornering and easier handling even for beginner racers. This Carrera GO!!! car in 1:43 scale will work on all Carrera GO!!! slot car racing tracks. Expand your Carrera GO!!! slot car collection or build and customize your slot car racetrack with this and many other Carrera GO!!! cars, parts, and accessories! For over 50 years, Carrera has brought the thrilling world of motor sports into homes around the world. For both beginners and experienced racers, Carrera slot car tracks and cars provide the most realistic racing action. Carrera makes the dreams of racing drivers come true - However old, however young!']

RPM 80465 A-Arm Blue T-MAXX 2.5R, 3.3 Blue
['From the Manufacturer', "RPM A-arms for the T-Maxx 2.5R, 3.3 & E-Maxx 16.8 are built to handle some serious abuse! We've redesigned these a-arms to compensate for the larger axle diameters of the 2.5R, 3.3 & 16.8 with axle clearance zones built right in, yet these clearance areas do not compromise the strength. These A-arms are lighter than ever before, yet still maintain all of the qualities that RPM customers have come to expect from RPM A-arms – rugged durability, unrivaled performance, strength comparable to or better than many alloy A-arms, yet are lighter than those same alloy parts and pricing unbeatable by any other aftermarket A-arm set existing. All this and we back our A-arms with the best breakage warranty in the R/C industry! We mold these A-arms in four different color choices, including a dyeable version for the ultimate in customization options and are sold in packages of one upper and one lower A-arm."]
['For use on the T-MAXX 2.5R, 3.3', 'Tech Notes: FOUR packages of RPM A-arms will be needed to complete one truck. These A-arms are compatible with all previous versions of the T-Maxx and the E-Maxx. T-Maxx 1.5 owners will need the longer T-Maxx 2.5 turnbuckles and axles.', 'Serious strength and rigidity while the chemical make up of our proprietary blend of nylons provides unmatched durability', "Backed by RPM's world-renowned breakage warranty", 'RPM is a proud American manufacturer designing and manufacturing 100% of our molded products right here in the USA!']

['Why Should You Choose H&W Suction Cup Spinning Top Toy?Premium Silicone：It is made of food-grade soft silicone, which is safe and soft and can bite. This fine adjuster can be used as a gutta percha during teething to prevent the baby from feeling unwell! 10  ~  #1556 Plate Block of 4 x 10 cents US Postage stamps
["On February 28, 1975 in Mountain View, CA; the USPS comemmorated Pioneer 10, the first spacecraft to travel through the asteroid belt, on July 15, 1972, and to make direct observations of Jupiter, which it passed by on December 3, 1973. It was launched from Cape Canaveral Air Force Station's Launch Complex 36A on March 3, 1972. Pioneer 10 is heading in the direction of Aldebaran, located in Taurus. By some definitions, Pioneer 10 has become the first artificial object to leave the solar system. It is the first human-built object to have been set upon a trajectory leading out of the solar system. However, according to the estimated trajectory, it has not yet passed the heliopause or the Oort cloud. Its objectives were to study the interplanetary and planetary magnetic fields, solar wind parameters, cosmic rays, transition region of the heliosphere, neutral hydrogen abundance, distribution, size, mass, flux, and velocity of dust particles, Jovian aurorae, Jovian radio waves, atmosphere of Jupiter and some of its satellites (particularly Io), and to photograph Jupiter and its satellites. There is no longer communication with the probe; the last contact was in 2003 and in 2006 a final attempt at contact failed."]

['These mini-adventures are designed for a fantasy frontier, in a mountainous arctic area. Use them to populate a hex crawl, fill out a campaign, or inspire one-shot games. You can use sidequests to introduce them, or to grow their roles once characters choose them as friends—or enemies. Two Events! In addition, there are 18 sidequests based around a big event that affects the whole area! One card explains the situation, and nine adventures provide threats and opportunities. Offer them to players in any order, and let them be part of the changes in your dynamic setting. 1: A vast sinkhole yawns open near the town overnight! What lies below? 2: Spring does not come. Istanbul Mehmet Cymbals Custom Series CMS15 15-Inch Sultan Medium Crash Cymbal
['Sultan cymbals are a combination of the Traditional and the Turk Series. The sound has unique brilliant characteristics of the Traditional cymbal sounds and the dry & woody sound of the unlathed Turk cymbal series. The top of the cymbal has an unlathed cup producing a strong, compact bell sound and an unlathed concentric circle on the bow reducing overtone and drying the sound. The bottom of the cymbal is completely unlathed. Mellow Tone. Great Stick Definition. Controlled Overtones. ABOUT  MEHMET  - Mehmet Tamdeger learned his art from Mikhail Zilcan, the grandson of Kerope Zilcan, after whom the Zilcan K series is named. In the 1950s, he worked in the K. Zilcan factory in Istanbul. At the age of nine Mehmet Tamdeğer started to work for Mikhail Zilcan. Mikhail Zilcan and Kirkor Küçükyan taught him every aspect of this ancient Turkish art, based on a history that stems back to the early 17th century. The Istanbul brand name was adopted by a cymbal works established by two cymbal smiths, Mehmet Tamdeger and Agop Tomurcuk. At that time, they had over three decades of cymbal making experience. Mehmet and Agop named their company after the city that has been home to the epitome of high quality cymbals for many, many years: Istanbul. These cymbals were first exported to the U.S. in 1984, first under the name "Zildjiler", and soon afterwards as "Istanbul". Both craftsmen signed each cymbal and many of these cymbals are now collectors\' items. After Agop Tomurcuk\'s unexpected death in July 1996, Mehmet decided to continue the production of cymbals under his own name, İstanbul Mehmet. A lot has changed since then, but his belief in the richness and the character of a handmade cymbal will always remain. Machines don\'t have ears. That\'s why we continue to make our cymbals according to the ancient tradition - with an open eye towards the music that\'s being made now, and in the future.']

(Comparably priced analog wireless systems offer 50Hz-15kHz frequency response and >90dB dynamic range. ['Want your performance to really stand out? The Vibraslap will give you that special touch, making your performance extra memorable and authentic. Its distinctive rattling sound has been used in famous songs for decades. Extremely easy to use and set up, the Vibraslap is perfect as a beginner instrument and for those with no musical experience. Holding the back metal bar, simply slap the wooden ball against the palm of your hand or thigh. The instrument can be held with the ball facing up or down. Our Vibraslap can play 2 different tones - a louder chattering sound, and softer muter rattle. To switch between the two sounds, simply rotate the wooden chamber 90 degrees, and tighten in place with the screw. Our handy velvet drawstring bag makes transporting the Vibraslap a breeze, and protects it from nicks or scrapes. We also include a bonus mini tambourine and illustrated instructions. Add this great instrument to your musical ensemble today!']

DW  Accelerator Single Bass Pedal
["An industry standard gets even better. We've reengineered the pedal that established our reputation for innovation and quality. Because innovation is part of our DNA we thought it was time for some major improvements. Most notably, the toe clamp. The 5000 needed more gripping strength, providing a stronger connection between the drummer and kick drum. So, we developed the Tri-Pivot Toe Clamp (U.S. Patent No. ). Three independent 360 degree, rotating rubber pads firmly pinch almost any diameter and thickness bass drum counter hoop from the top and the bottom, with zero slippage. Add to that a new textured rubber grip pad on the base plate and we think you'll agree that there’s never been a better system for attaching a pedal to a bass drum. Last, but certainly not least, we wanted to improve on the smoothness and feel of the 5000, if that was even possible. To accomplish this, we added a Dual Bearing Spring Rocker, making the 5000 quicker and more responsive. The Accelerator (AD4) drive system offers an eccentric motion that creates an indirect relationship between the sprocket and the footboard, increasing the velocity of the pedal by shortening the length of the stroke. It is recommended for situations that require increased speed and sensitivity."]

Devious Weasel Dûhr: The Lesser Houses
['Duhr accommodates 4 to 6 players. Each player is the master of a Lesser House of Duhr, vying for Great House status. Players take turns using cards in their hand to trigger events, place suspicions and scandals on each other’s House, or activate their House’s unique ability to affect cards already placed. The accumulation of suspicion and scandal cards on a House erodes the populace’s favor for that House. All Houses begin play favored and free of suspicions and scandals. When a House gains a total of 5 suspicion and/or scandal cards, it falls into disfavor with the populace. If a disfavored House has 3 or more revealed scandal cards, it becomes vilified. The game ends when the number of favored Houses remaining is 1 or none. Whoever has the highest score, based on the cards on their House and their secret agenda, wins. It is possible for a disfavored or vilified House to outscore a favored House and win the game! Table talk, card trading, and deal-making are encouraged.']

['This new card game from Spin Master Games is the ultimate party activity that you will want to have up your sleeve, whether it’s at a college dorm, happy hour, or a bachelorette party. Give hints to your team to guess as many cards as possible before time runs out, without breaking the die’s rule! There are 3 categories on the die. Show Don’t Tell: no words allowed, let your body do the talking. Props encouraged! One Syllable: only words with a single syllable. This would work, but this wouldn’t work. Freestyle: Any words are fair game, just not what’s on the card. No gestures allowed! Topic categories include People, Traits, Things, Places, and NSFW. How many cards can you help your team guess within 60 seconds? Keep your cards to see who has the most at the end… AKA the winning team. This game is for teens and adults ages 18 and up, and we advise playing with family and coworkers at your own risk! Your friends are sure to die of laughter at these risqué cards. This card game also makes a great stocking stuffer, party favor, or housewarming gift. Grab your favorite people and play #TellMeGame ASAP.']

Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. If a high pressure latex inflator is used to inflate the foil balloon it can burn a hole in the balloons self sealing mechanism or tear the seam, creating a leak. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier.  HAZARD – Children under 8 yrs. can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Golden Age Project Comp-3A Vintage Style Compressor Limiting Amplifier
['Channel Vintage Style Compressor. The COMP-3A is a single-channel vintage-style Compressor/Leveler. The signal path uses only discrete components like resistors, capacitors and transistors, and the input and output is transformer balanced using two different transformers, each one optimized for its purpose. This is the way audio components were built before integrated circuits became available. Integrated circuits are small and cheap and widely used in most modern designs. The drawback is that audio components built with modern technology don’t always provide the best sound quality or the type of character that the modern user desires. The subjective sound quality delivered by vintage equipment is often preferred over the one delivered by modern units, a situation that is even more obvious now when music is recorded with clean-sounding digital audio equipment. This is the reason why so many vintage audio components are cloned and produced again, and also why the vintage originals are often very expensive on the second-hand market. The circuit used in the COMP-3A is based on a classic design that uses an electro-luminescent panel and a photoelectric cell to control gain. This gives the COMP-3A unique, program-dependent compression characteristics. In addition, the vintage-style signal path adds a wonderful and musical character to the sound. The ease of use with only two main controls makes it very simple to achieve the desired sound. These attributes hav made the original units a favorite of engineers and musicians worldwide. This classic sound is now available at a very affordable price point with the COMP-3A.']
['No integrated circuits in the signal path Transformer-balanced input and output Selectable output transformer loading resistors by an internal T4-style electro-optical attenuator Very simple to operate with only two main controls, Gain and Peak Reduction A big meter shows gain reduction or output level at two different reference levels Hardwire bypass switch for easy comparisons XLR and TRS input and output jacks for flexible connections Link jack and switch for conne', 'The COMP-3A is a single-channel vintage-style Compressor/Leveler', 'The signal path uses only discrete components like resistors, capacitors and transistors, and the input and output is transformer balanced using two different transformers, each one optimized for its purpose', 'This is the way audio components were built before integrated circuits became available', 'Integrated circuits are small and cheap and widely used in most modern designs']

Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. If a high pressure latex inflator is used to inflate the foil balloon it can burn a hole in the balloons self sealing mechanism or tear the seam, creating a leak. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier. ["The DiMarzio Gravity Storm humbucking pickup gives you plenty of output and rich tone, and now GearNuts offers it to you! Developed for legendary guitarist Steve Vai, the Gravity Storm features 4-conductor wiring, Alnico V magnets, and DiMarzio's patented dual-resonance configuration, which produces more harmonic overtones than conventional humbuckers. This bridge pickup gives you warm highs and mids that are great for increasing the treble response of your amp without losing the tone on the upper frets. A great pickup for pushing your amp to its full tonal potential, the Gravity Storm is perfect for live gigs, while giving you plenty of tone and definition in the studio too. Pump up your guitar's tone with the DiMarzio Gravity Storm humbucker."]

['The Rocket represents the pinnacle of 157 years of harmonica experience and innovation. Hohner’s latest plastic combed harmonica is the loudest, most comfortable and most responsive diatonic harmonica on the market today. Like the Special 20 and Golden Melody, Hohner uses plastic for the Rocket’s comb material because plastic doesn’t swell which allows the harmonica to maintain its air tightness. The Rocket maintains its smooth curves and sleek design through to its cover plate which has no gaps between it and the reed plate. Harmonicas with gaps in the cover plate have traditionally been known to catch on facial hair. Deity Microphones V-Mic D3 Pro Super Cardioid Directional Condenser Shotgun Microphone with Location Kit
["Out of all the exhibitors at Cine Gear, Deity Microphones' V-Mic D3 Pro was picked for the 2018 Personal View's Best Product Award. The World's First Smart Microphone Inside the V-Mic D3 Pro lives a microprocessor that digitally shakes hands with the audio input it's been plugged into. The D3 Pro will work with a phone, tablet, DSLR, body pack transmitters; just about anything with a 3.5mm microphone jack. We have tested it on a dozen DSLR models, two dozen phones, a handful of Android based tablets and the microphone inputs on laptops. When plugged into devices that have a stereo microphone input, the V-Mic D3 Pro outputs dual mono tracks. It can also be adapted to some microphone inputs that use the mini XLR jack. The World's Only Microphone with a Stepless Gain Knob The V-Mic D3 Pro features a +20dB step-less analog gain adjustment dial. On each side of the dial the V-Mic D3 Pro features a bump guard that helps prevent the dial from being accidentally rotated. The +20dB of gain is added on a linear scale so you can dial in the exact amount of gain you need for the shot. Internal Battery Inside the V-Mic D3 Pro lives a 320mAh Lithium Ion battery. Run time for the V-Mic D3 Pro is 51 hours and will automatic turn off if left in standby mode for 15 minutes. The battery is charged in a little less than 2 hrs. On-Board Low Cut Filters The V-Mic D3 Pro features two levels of low cut: 75hz and 150hz. And"]

: Unification of Japan: 3rd Printing
["Sekigahara - The Unification of Japan (5th Printing) The battle of Sekigahara, fought in 1600 at a crossroads in Japan, unified that nation under the Tokugawa family for more than 250 years. Sekigahara allows you to re-contest that war as Ishida Mitsunari, defender of a child heir, or Tokugawa Ieyasu, Japan's most powerful daimyo (feudal lord). The campaign lasted only 7 weeks, during which each side improvised an army and a strategy with what forces their allies could provide. Each leader harbored deep doubts as to the loyalty of his units - for good reason. Several daimyo refused to fight; some even turned sides in the midst of battle. To conquer Japan you must do more than field an army - you must be sure it will follow you into combat. Cultivate the loyalty of your allies and deploy them only when you are confident of their allegiance. Win a battle by gaining a defection from the ranks of your opponent. Sekigahara is replete with unusual mechanics: No dice are used Cards represent loyalty and motivation. Without a matching card, an army will not enter battle. Allegiance is represented by hand size, which fluctuates each turn. Battles are a series of deployments, from hidden unit stacks, based on hidden loyalty factors. Loyalty Challenge cards create potential defection events. Sekigahara is a 3-hour block game based on the Japanese campaign waged in 1600. The 7-week war, fought along Japan's two major highways and in scattered sieges and backcountry skirmishes, elevated Tokugawa Ieyasu to Shogun and unified Japan for 265 years."]
['Fifth Printing Note: This printing is identical to the 4th printing, except that any known errata will be corrected.', ': Mounted Map, 119 wooden pieces, 1 and 1/2 sticker sheets, 110 cards, Rulebook, Two player aid cards', "Sekigahara\xa0allows you to re-contest that war as Ishida Mitsunari, defender of a child heir, or Tokugawa Ieyasu, Japan's most powerful\xa0daimyo\xa0(feudal lord)."]

["Barbie Skipper Babysitters Inc. dolls and playsets let kids explore their nurturing side this feeding and bath-time themed set lets them be the babysitter with a fun, role-play feature.
